docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJDUGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-13-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT URIBE, ANCHULITA
